name: A-ha
bio: A-ha's catalog still earns through 1980s playlist dominance, durable video-era recognition, and long-tail global streaming.
notable_for: Synth-pop recordings with unusually strong visual and melodic recall.
career_highlight: Their signature songs still generate significant long-tail replay decades later.
revenue_drivers: Global nostalgia playlists support recurring streams.
Iconic video-era recognition helps sustain catalog demand.
Film, documentary, and media reuse keep the songs visible.
